age: Minimum age 21 Years (age eligibility only; not a menopause claim)
exact_evidence_passage: In the present study, low-dose digoxin was safe in the 284 women studied, and a similar signal was also seen in 247 women who received (low-dose) digitoxin in DIGIT-HF 9 . These data therefore provide reassurance regarding the use of (low-dose) digoxin in women.
validation_notes: quote verified verbatim against the stored source.
